_note: Deterministic subset only; the CRC-impossible content checks are declared in `exclude` (with reasons) so coverage_check accounts for every content check instead of silently dropping them.

steps.run: envsubst < pod-compliant.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc wait --for=condition=Ready pod/hello-compliant --timeout=120s

exclude.reason: CRC portless session SA can be granted anyuid/privileged, so the root Pod is ADMITTED instead of rejected; the admission-rejection lesson only reproduces on a real DCS restricted namespace.
remediation is an interactive editor edit of pod-root.yaml a headless smoke run can't perform.
depends on the excluded remediation step; CRC SCC priority may also report a different SCC than restricted-v2.
